entry.title: Where can I learn how to use SAP IBP Time Series Based Constrained Supply Planning with Optimize ?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Mastering the supply optimizer in SAP IBP for Time-Series Based Constrained Supply Planning learning journey.
With the completion of this learning journey, you will be prepared for the certification C_S4CS. 

Learning Objectives
In this comprehensive course you will gain a solid understanding of the SAP IBP Time Series Based Supply Planning business processes using Optimizer, and their associated configuration.
DO NOT attempt to take this course without first completing the recommended courses for SAP IBP for Supply Chain Overview (IBP1010, IBP1020, IBP2200, IBP2400, IBP2500, IBP2600, IBP2700 & IBP2800), for Discovering the Main Configuration for SAP IBP (IBP2300) AND for SAP IBP Platform Features and Time Series Based Heuristics Planning (IBP3210 & IBP3220). If you attempt to take IBP3710 without first completing the mandatory prerequisite courses, you will not achieve the maximum benefits, and some concepts may be difficult to comprehend.​

Learning objectives
This course will prepare you to: 

  • ​Outline the features of SAP IBP Time Series Based Constrained Supply Planning with Optimizer  
  • Describe in detail: Modeling, Key Figures, and Parameters  
  • Utilize Operators and Optimizers 

Prerequisites
Essential: 

  • ​IBP1010 - Exploring Planning Processes in SAP IBP
  • IBP1020 - Exploring Tools & Features in SAP IBP
  • IBP2200 – Discovering SAP IBP for S&OP
  • IBP2300 –Discovering the Main Configuration for SAP IBP
  • IBP2400 - Discovering SAP IBP for Inventory Planning and Optimization
  • IBP2500 - Discovering SAP Supply Chain Control Tower  

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to get Situation notification for GR (Goods Recei...
entry.content: Thanks. I was now able to find some logs and seems that event is triggered. However it has error message: Data loss occurred when converting 20255000000205.

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Determination Error on FOC Sale Invoice...
entry.content: PRCTR Profit Center

entry.title: Re: Commenting in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Bharath, 

Thank you for the detailed explanation.
I have a question regarding Datapoint Commenting in SAC:
Is it possible to retrieve comments made on the same data cells in SAC through SAP Analytics for Office (AfO)?
From my experience, I am unable to see the comments on data cells in SAP AfO, even though they are already saved in the SAP BW document store and I have selected the same query.


Could you please help explain the reasons for this, and let me know if there is a way to view these comments in AfO?


Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Determination Error on FOC Sale Invoice...
entry.content: Field : PRCTR Zero Balance Tick mark Yes Mandatory Field Tick Mark Yes SEGMENT Zero Balance Tick Mark Yes PSEGMENT Mandatory Field tick mark Yes

entry.title: OS Requirements for Installation of SAP on DB2 11.1?
entry.content:
WHAT are the OS Requirements for Installation of SAP on DB2 11.1?

What are the file systems required at OS level that needs to be mounted by OS team?

I'm having OS - SLES VERSION="15-SP5

entry.title: Re: Profit Center Determination Error on FOC Sale Invoice...
entry.content:
Can you untick the field defined as mandatory and do your action again please?

And tell me if you still have the same message.

Thak you in advance for your feedback.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Are there known performance issues with BAPI_CONTRACT_CREATEFROMDATA related to SD_COND_ACCESS?
entry.content:
Hi @jeroen_cosijnse 

The member created this discussion way back in 2022 and you inserted your query in such an old post.  Please create a new discussion by citing this thread as an additional information so that members will assist you.

entry.title: Release Navigator for SAP BTP - What's New in Q2 2025
entry.content:
The Release Navigator for SAP BTP continues to evolve and expand, offering our customers improved resources and streamlined access to product updates. As we step into Q2 2025, we are excited to announce the addition of 11 new product pages. Read more about the details in this blog post.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Collaborating closely with SAP BTP experts, we've expanded the release coverage by introducing 11 new product pages. These pages compile links to all available release information, such as schedules, pre- and post-release communications, blogs, and more:

  • SAP Audit Log Service
  • SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service
  • SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment
  • SAP Connectivity Service
  • SAP Credential Store
  • SAP Custom Domain Service
  • SAP Destination Service
  • SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
  • SAP Malware Scanning Service
  • SAP Private Link Service
  • SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI

You will notice that several of these pages share certain resources which are relevant across SAP BTP services that are relating to security.

Here's a glimpse at our new additions:

 

1. SAP Audit Log Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Audit Log service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Audit Log service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Audit Log service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

2. SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Audit Log service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Audit Log service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Audit Log service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out. 

 

3. SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment

This page contains specific resources for SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • Release Schedule in SAP Note
  • SAP Roadmap Explorer
  • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
  • SAP Community Tag
  • Documentation: SAP Help Portal

Check it out.

 

4. SAP Connectivity Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Connectivity service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Connectivity service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Connectivity service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

5. SAP Credential Store

This page contains specific resources for SAP Credential service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Credential service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Credential service
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

6. SAP Custom Domain Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Custom Domain service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Custom Domain service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Custom Domain service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

7. SAP Destination Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Destination service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Destination service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Destination service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

8. SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh

This page contains specific resources for SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center

Check it out.

Additionally, the page for SAP Integration Suite has been extended by release resources for its capability SAP Event Mesh. You can find the following newly added resources on this page:

  • SAP Event Mesh
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • SAP Community Page
    • SAP Community Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal

Check it out.

 

9. SAP Malware Scanning Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Malware Scanning service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Malware Scanning service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Malware Scanning service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out. 

 

10. SAP Private Link Service

This page contains specific resources for SAP Private Link service as well as key release resources for SAP BTP security services, which also partially cover SAP Private Link service among others. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Private Link service
    • Release Schedule in SAP Note
    • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Discovery Center
  • SAP BTP Security services
    • SAP Roadmap Explorer
    • SAP Community Page & Tag
    • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
    • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
    • Customer Influence

Check it out.

 

11. SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI

This page contains specific resources for SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI. Here’s a list of what you can find on this page:

  • SAP Roadmap Explorer
  • What’s New Viewer: Release Notes
  • SAP Community Page
  • SAP Community Tag
  • SAP Security Products and Solutions Newsletter
  • Documentation: SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Discovery Center

Check it out.

 

Currently, the Release Navigator for SAP BTP proudly covers content for 41 products and services. See the full list below (underlined product pages have been added this update).

  • SAP AI Core
  • SAP AI Launchpad
  • SAP AI Services (incl. Data Attribute Recommendation, Document Information Extraction, Personalized Recommendation)
  • SAP Alert Notification
  • SAP Analytics Cloud
  • SAP Audit Log Service
  • SAP Authorization and Trust Management Service
  • SAP Automation Pilot
  • SAP BTP ABAP environment
  • SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry environment
  • SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
  • SAP Build
  • SAP Build Apps
  • SAP Build Code
  • SAP Build Process Automation
  • SAP Build Work Zone (advanced edition and standard edition)
  • SAP Business Application Studio
  • SAP Cloud Identity Services (incl. Authority Management, Identity Authentication, Identity Directory, Identity Provisioning)
  • SAP Cloud Transport Management
  • SAP Connectivity Service
  • SAP Content Agent Service
  • SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
  • SAP Credential Store
  • SAP Custom Domain Service
  • SAP Datasphere
  • SAP Destination Service
  • SAP HANA Cloud
  • SAP Integration Suite
  • SAP Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh
  • SAP Malware Scanning Service
  • SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition
  • SAP Mobile Services
  • SAP Private Link Service
  • SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI
  • SAP Translation Hub

More pages dedicated to specific products and services are expected in future updates.

 

For centralized information regarding the release of new features for SAP BTP products and services, consult the Consolidated Release Schedule for SAP BTP. Regarding the Release Navigator updates, refer to this update plan:

*Disclaimer: The schedule is subject to alterations without notice, including potential delays or the integration of changes in subsequent update windows. It doesn't establish a commitment, promise, or legal duty to deliver any material, code, or functionality. Looking into the remaining quarters of 2025, updates will focus on quarterly content maintenance and a steady extension of product coverage. No substantial UI updates are planned for the time being.

 

The Readiness@Scale team within SAP Enterprise Support is driven to ensure release readiness across the SAP Enterprise Support portfolio. Our mission is to empower SAP customers to effectively adopt and utilize innovations.

If you have feedback or specific requests for content within the release navigator, feel free to contact us.

Don't forget to explore our team’s blogs tagged under Readiness@Scale.

Happy navigating!

Readiness@Scale  
SAP Enterprise Support

entry.title: Re: System Measurement. SAP Solution Manager 7.2 as the Central LAW System. Step-by-step guide.
entry.content: Before step 8, would it be possible to add a step with required role(s) for SLAW2 transaction ?

entry.title: Language set in BO OLAP connection doesn't work with DATASPHERE
entry.content:
Hi all,
in our organization we detect this problem:
1- we migrated a BO Webi from BW source (Bex) to  DATASPHERE source (Analytical Model)
2- the connection to Datasphere was set in  OLAP connection section and it works
2- in the OLAP connection the flag on "Save language" was inserted

4- the authentication in SSO (there are no other choices because SSO was set in DATASPHERE)
5- the webi report returns the data in the browser language (English) and doesn't consider the language set in the OLAP connection ( in our case Italian).
This also happens when scheduling the webi report or scheduling the publication  that has the webi report as its source.

The BO version is :
SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.3 Support Pack 4 Patch 8
Version: 14.3.4.5099

Any idea to solve it?

Anna M

entry.title: Re: VBAP-FONDS empty (SAP SD and SAP PSM)
entry.content: Check SAP note 1502432 to see whether you need to apply manual corrections as recommended in this note.

entry.title: Re: What are the free certification available for Consult...
entry.content:
Hi @Margit_Wagner, Good evening.

Just had a follow up question since you mentioned as a student, we get two exam attempts per year for free.

Can we attempt any of the below exams (twice per year)? Kindly confirm from your end.

Associate

  • C_TS4FI - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA for Financial Accounting Associates
  • C_TS4CO - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA for Management Accounting Associates
  • C_TS422 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Production Planning and Manufacturing
  • C_TS452 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement
  • C_TS462 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sales
  • C_TS410 - SAP Certified Application Associate - Business Process Integration
  • C_ACT_2403 - SAP Certified Associate - SAP Activate Project Manager
  • E_S4HCON - SAP Certified Technology Specialist - SAP S/4HANA Conversion and SAP System Upgrade
  • C_TS413 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Asset Management

Upskilling

  • C_TS450 - SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

    Thanks in advance.

    Best Regards
    Arun

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @StephanieMarley  Thanks you 😊

entry.title: Can OpenSSL in Crystal Reports 2025 be an install option or upgraded to OpenSSL 3.0.7 or later?
entry.content:
An Air Force client would like to use Crystal Reports 2025. A cybersecurity scan of the installation show the "libeaym64.dll" and "ssleaym64.dll" as vulnerable OpenSSL (1.0.2) shared library files. To mitigate this vulnerability,

1) Can the OpenSSL be a selectable install option? -OR-

2) Can the OpenSSL used be updated to OpenSSL 3.0.7 or later ?

Thanks for your assistance...

entry.title: Re: Duplicated invoice issue happened
entry.content: Hello SAP Community, did anyone get the solution to why one delivery is generating two invoices?

entry.title: Unable to Populate SUN Field (Service User Number) in GB_CGI_XML_CT
entry.content:
Unable to Populate SUN (Service User Number)Field in GB_CGI_XML_CT 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: PPM Project Procurement integration
entry.content:
Hello EPPM Experts, 

I need to know if there is any fonctionnalities in PPM to have a visibility on Procurements actions for materials and equipements in terms of planning, availability ...etc.

Thanks in advance for your helps. 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Unable to Populate SUN Field (Service User Number) in...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation Configuring Payment Medium Formats 

See as referenced in same 

  1. To be able to fill out each field in the GB_BACS format, you can make settings in the following configuration activities:

    • Define User Number at Bank in Norway, United Kingdom, and Ireland (ID: 103132)

      In this configuration step, you define a user number at the bank per company code, country, and bank number.

    • Define Bank Transaction Code for United Kingdom (ID: 103131)

      In this configuration step, you define the bank transaction code for the customer/vendor and the bank transaction code for the house bank per country/region, payment method, and bank number.

    • Enter Name of Building Society (ID: 103133)

      In this configuration step, you enter the name of the building society for each bank or bank account.


      See 

      payment medium format GB_BACS

      This payment format defined by BACS is used for domestic direct debit and Bacs direct credit.

      Payments by BACS - SAP Documentation

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Really happy to join

entry.title: Re: Unable to Populate SUN Field (Service User Number) in...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation Configuring Payment Medium Formats 

See as referenced in same 

  1. To be able to fill out each field in the GB_BACS format, you can make settings in the following configuration activities:

    • Define User Number at Bank in Norway, United Kingdom, and Ireland (ID: 103132)

      In this configuration step, you define a user number at the bank per company code, country, and bank number.

    • Define Bank Transaction Code for United Kingdom (ID: 103131)

      In this configuration step, you define the bank transaction code for the customer/vendor and the bank transaction code for the house bank per country/region, payment method, and bank number.

    • Enter Name of Building Society (ID: 103133)

      In this configuration step, you enter the name of the building society for each bank or bank account.


      See 

      payment medium format GB_BACS

      This payment format defined by BACS is used for domestic direct debit and Bacs direct credit.

      Payments by BACS - SAP Documentation

entry.title: Open Connectors via APIM:
entry.content:
1. Create an API Provider for Open connectors Service Now instance using Type “Open Connectors”

 

  1. Create a proxy using API provider created in step1

No policies created on API Proxy, as we are going to pass Authorization on header in postman

  1. Create a product & add API proxy to the product

  1. Create an application in developer HUB with product created in step3 & fetch APP key & Secret for authentication purpose.

 

Testing:

  1. Use the PROXY endpoint along with the resource path to call. Use the API key & secret as authentication. Use the authorization in header for Open connectors

  1. Get incidents from Open connector Instance of Service Now:

Try to fetch the same from Postman as well using the suffix part of the URL to call incidents resource (/incidents)

Regards,

Rohini Potham

entry.title: Re: Weighted interview questions
entry.content:
Hi,

Yes,You're correct that SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting doesn't natively support weighted scoring in the way your current system does.

However, there are alternative approaches and configurations within SuccessFactors that can help you achieve a similar outcome.

  1. Explore Pre-Screening Questions: Implement weighted pre-screening questions to capture essential qualifications early in the hiring process.
  2. Define Competencies: Clearly define competencies for each role and assign appropriate weights to reflect their importance.
  3. Customize Rating Scales: Develop custom rating scales that align with your organization's evaluation criteria.
  4. Utilize AI Insights: Leverage AI-assisted feedback tools to gain deeper insights into candidate evaluations.
  5. Consider Manual Calculations: Use external tools for complex calculations and reporting needs.

Hope this helps!! Please let me know if you need assistance on configuring these features within SF or developing custom reports.

Thanks,

kr,

karthick.

entry.title: Re: Calling a Remote Action from Event Handler in CAP Java
entry.content: As addition "Actions" for CAP Java are supported. https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#querying-api-features

entry.content:
I would recommend creating a copy of a database definition file and tailoring it to your needs.

Chris

entry.title: Re: Data Action - Place Dimension = # on the valid combin...
entry.content: Hi William_Yu! It worked by multiplying with ((RESULTLOOKUP()/RESULTLOOKUP())+1). Thanks!

entry.title: Customer Influence and Adoption for SAP FS-CD
entry.content:
Continuous Influence Sessions

Ideas and development requests can be submitted directly to SAP via various programs. SAP offers, for example, Continuous Influence Sessions.

User Groups

There are also other channels for influencing development, for example, through various user groups such as DSAG or ASUG. There are also product-specific user groups such as the FS-CD DACH User Group for German-speaking FS-CD users.

Creating a request via Continuous Influence Sessions

In this article, I will focus on Continuous Influence Sessions. To participate, you must register at Customer Influencer. The introductory pages contain helpful links to information on how these Continuous Influence Sessions work.

 

Unfortunately, the challenge here is that there is no dedicated session specifically for FS-CD. As a customer, you can only contribute your ideas to existing sessions.

As with many other SAP resources, it helps to know how SAP Collections and Disbursements for Insurance is used in SAP solutions. Firstly, it's based on the industry-neutral SAP Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable and is part of SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management . This means you can also search for sessions on these two solutions to submit ideas for FS-CD

Using the search function, you can then find a current session for BRIM and submit your cross-industry development requests there.

 

After submitting a development request, other users can vote for it.

 

It's a good idea to coordinate within the user groups to get as many votes as possible. Once a certain number of votes are received, the development request is reviewed by the respective product manager. This isn't a guarantee of implementation, but it is the first step toward a new feature.

entry.title: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have extracted a SEPA file from the Starter system and we are getting a format error when uploading it into the bank. The file should be version pain.001.001.03 and the system generates a version pain.001.001.09 file.
Reviewing the SAP documentation for SPAIN we see that the CGI format we are using should output pain.001.001.03:

 

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal

Asignación de formato de pago específico de país o región | SAP Help Portal


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content:
Check the payment medium format used for payment.

See apps Manage Automatic Payments and Manage Payment medium 

 

See help.sap.com documentation 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a624a4a6d1d8473eb95fb42660127cfe/d6af5407b276477f9698f816e684ae27.html?locale=en-US&q=ES_CGI_XML_CT_V9

 

If payment medium format is used ES_CGI_XML_CT_V9. See version of pain referenced below. 

This payment format is a new version of the CGI format, it is version pain.001.001.09. It is available in addition to version pain.001.001.03.

@David_Chaviano 
Can you please support @arymak87 inquiry?

Margit

entry.title: Concurrent Employment in Recruiting
entry.content: Since concurrent employments aren't supported in Recruiting solution, How are you currently managing internal career site access for employees with concurrent employment? Because, currently, when there is an application submitted through one of the employments, the employee loses access to the career site.

entry.title: Re: Resize of Group Tree does not work anymore
entry.content: Nice do you know the release date of SP338?

entry.title: Re: Country version Spain SEPA file
entry.content: See also Configuring Payment Medium Formats: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/031c345485b84c8c94265be9ef61d3a8/80b9cdd8bd1947a7a5d1bd2ec2894e4b.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Am I Prepared for the C_LCNC_2406 Exam? Looking for Final Tips!
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm getting ready to take the C_LCNC_2406 – SAP Certified Associate - Low-Code/No-Code Developer exam and would really appreciate some input from those who've been through it.

Here's what my prep looks like so far:

  • Completed BTP100 & BTP110 (Citizen Development fundamentals)
  • Finished APP400, SPA400, and WZ400 courses
  • Gained hands-on experience with SAP Build Apps, Process Automation, and Work Zone
  • Scored around 70–75% on mock tests
  • Using P2PCerts practice questions, which have been helpful for understanding the format and question style

Based on your experience, does this sound like solid prep?
Are there any key topics I should review again or any additional resources you’d recommend?

Thanks in advance for any tips or insights — especially from those who’ve passed recently!

entry.title: Re: how to access to the additional data provided by an o...
entry.content:
Hi User 116,

The data capture during ADC is only visible to the Onboardee during capture. If you want to expose it, you have two options.

  1. Generate documentation as per the suggested answer and distribute that to a responsible group.
  2. Generate a Story Report that populates the required data.

Regards

Frans

entry.title: Re: BAPI to remove ship-to from business partner
entry.content: As you already migrated to S/4HANA look at class CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN method MAINTAIN

entry.title: Concat two dimension properties and pass it to booked dimension values (Script)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have some booked values stamped on [d/func_area] = # and the correct [d/gl_account] and [d/cost_center].

I can derive the actual functional area by concatting two properties from [d/gl_account] and [d/cost_center].

My question is, if it is possible by scripting to stamp the data on the correct [d/func_area]?

Best regards

entry.title: My Journey to Becoming SAP Certified: From Missed Opportunity to TS410 Success
entry.content:
I don't know if this should be a blog or just a comment under the post about Free SAP Certification and Practice Systems for Students — but I felt compelled to share my story.

Late 2023 was a turning point for me. I had just switched careers into the SAP ecosystem and was fortunate to secure a SAP Application Support role in early 2024. By August, I had progressed to an Application Manager position. While the growth was exciting, it came with real-world challenges — one of them being the missed opportunity to use the free certification code I received from the Digital Skills Initiative. With work pressures and the need to build foundational SAP knowledge, I couldn't prepare in time, and the code eventually expired. Despite my efforts, I couldn’t redeem it again.

Still, I didn’t give up. My interest in SAP had grown into a passion. I later enrolled in a postgraduate ERP (SAP) Functional Consultant programme at one of SAP’s University Partners, which also qualifies me for the new Digital Skills Initiative (Free SAP Certification and Practice Systems for Students) and access to practice systems. I saw it as a second chance — and I grabbed it with both hands.

I activated my student subscription through the initiative and committed to my studies with renewed focus. I’m beyond thrilled (and honestly, emotional) to share that I passed my SAP Certified Application Associate – Business Process Integration with SAP S/4HANA (TS410) certification exam on Sunday, May 11th — Mother's Day. It was a significant day for me both personally and professionally. That day now holds even more meaning for me — and the cover photo I’ve used here was actually a Mother's Day gift, symbolizing celebration, growth, and gratitude.

To those just beginning their journey or feeling discouraged after a setback — I want you to know: don’t give up. Your path may not be linear or perfect, but every experience builds you. These SAP resources, from learning journeys to practice systems and community support, are truly invaluable. Make the most of them. Keep learning, keep growing, and show up for yourself every step of the way.

To the SAP Learning team and everyone behind the @Digital Skills Initiative — thank you for making global upskilling a reality. To fellow learners and community members: you’ve got this. 💪🌟

entry.title: Fixed Assets Migration - Asset Value Date and Depreciation calculation Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

As part of our fixed assets migration, we are experiencing an issue with the depreciation calculation.

The assets in question are being migrated during the fiscal year, and the Legacy Data Transfer Settings have been configured in the application “Make Company Code Settings – Asset Accounting Specific”, with a Transfer Date of 30/04/2025.

However, after migrating the assets, we noticed that the depreciation calculation started from 01/01/2025 instead of from period 04/2025.

Upon reviewing the assets post-migration, we found that the Asset Value Date was set to 01/01/2025, even though we did not populate this field in the migration template. We believe that this field is the root cause of the issue.

Could you please clarify how this field is derived?

For your information, we filled in the following three tabs in the “Fixed Assets – Postings” migration object: Posting Key ; Cumulative Values ;Transaction Headers.

We also noticed that the Asset Value Date field exists in the Transaction Items tab, which we did not initially complete. We did tests by filling in this tab, but encountered errors due to the Asset Transaction Type 970 (Asset Data Transfer) we used.

Is there another asset transaction type that should be used for mid-year data migrations ? Please suggest an alternative solution if possible.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: When I create a material in S4Hana the following error shown.
entry.content:
Internal error in FORM/FUNCTION CKMS_PERIOD_POST_DELTA in position 0 with RC - when ever I initiate the ACCOUNTING VIEW and save the material - the internal error - and "Express information update was cancelled". thats why I do not have any way to update the stock for the particular material thru MIGO. Kindly give the solution for this.

Thanks

Suresh Maniarasu

entry.title: Re: Sunset of BEx Tools in SAP BW - What You Need to Know Before October 2025
entry.content: Very important and useful information, thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Re: Unfix Fixed Schedule Lines after partial delivery
entry.content: Hello Ibrahim, We also have the same issue. Where you able to find a workaround?

entry.title: PCR for making Gratuity calculation as Zero for select Employee Sub Group
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

I need to write a PCR for Payroll.

The scenario is:

For employee in the Sub Group "AG" (Apprentice)

1. If the WT9423 (Provisional Gratuity ) is present in IT set the value as Null, and also for the wagetype 1216 (actual gratuity paid)

Basically the Provisional Wagetype 9423 and the Actual Gratuity Wagetype 1216 should not be calculated for the employee sub group "AG".

Also where exactly we can insert this PCR in the payroll schema.

Thanks

Kumar.

entry.title: Re: SAC Import scheduled jobs didn't start at all in a si...
entry.content: Hello Martin, yes it happened on Saturday night when SAP usually makes its updates. Thank you so much for your reply

entry.title: Product Inspiration Series - Experience a New Era of SAP CX (wave #1)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I'm excited to share our latest deep dive videos as part of the SAP Product Inspiration Series 2025 focusing on innovations across SAP CX and Consumer Industries. 

Wave #1 (April 2025):

1. Predictive Planning and Inventory Orchestration from SAP

Vinayak Kini from the Retail Product Team at SAP provides an overview on Predictive Planning and Inventory Orchestration. Watch this product inspiration video to learn more about this new end-to-end cloud solution covering Order and Demand Scheduling, Unified Demand Forecasting and Predictive Replenishment as well as our major innovations as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio from SAP.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
01:12 - Why Predictive Planning & Inventory Orchestration from SAP?
03:02 - Where can SAP’s solution help transform a Retailer’s operations?
05:29 - How can retailers implement Predictive Planning & Inventory Orchestration from SAP?
06:46 - Start of the Demo
06:58 - Demo: SAP Order and Delivery Scheduling
09:02 - Demo: Unified Demand Forecast in SAP Customer Activity Repository
11:15 - Demo: Review Order Plan Items in SAP Customer Activity Repository
13:58 - Demo: SAP Predictive Replenishment
18:54 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

2. Extensibility of SAP Sales and Service Cloud V2 using No Code / Low Code Tools

Join an in-depth session between Sophie Crepin from SAP Customer Success and Vinay Prasad from SAP Product Engineering regarding no-code low-code extensibility of SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2. Watch this product inspiration video to learn how easy it is to adapt and extend your SAP cloud solution and hear about major innovations as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio from SAP.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
03:26 - Start of the Demo
03:37 - Demo: Defining Extension Fields and Validation Logic
07:39 - Demo: Building Lightweight Extensions using SAP Build Apps
12:35 - Demo: Creating Code List Restrictions
13:53 - Demo: Using Dynamic Page Layouts
15:41 - Demo: Embedding Custom Services
17:22 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

3. Sinch Omnichannel Customer Engagement for SAP CX

Venky Naravulu from the Sinch Product Team provides an overview on Sinch’s Omnichannel Messaging, Chatlayer and Contact Pro and how it integrates with SAP CX. Watch this product inspiration video to learn how AI-powered omnichannel marketing interactions and customer service can be delivered using Sinch’s Omnichannel Messaging, Chatlayer and Contact Pro along with SAP Emarsys and SAP Service Cloud Version 2.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:40 - Why Sinch and SAP CX?
01:59 - How can customers benefit from our joint solution?
03:38 - How is AI used in Sinch and along the SAP CX integration?
06:06 - Start of the Demo
07:05 - Demo: Sinch Template Creation for WhatsApp
10:39 - Demo: Sinch and SAP Emarsys Campaign Automation
14:06 - Demo: Sinch Contact Pro and WhatsApp integration using GenAI
19:53 - Demo: Sinch Contact Pro and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Integration
25:00 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

4. Open Payment Framework for SAP Commerce Cloud in Action

Wendy Wang from the Commerce Product Team at SAP provides an overview on Open Payment Framework (OPF). Watch this product inspiration video to learn how OPF for SAP Commerce Cloud providing a plug-and-play framework to ease integration complexity and offer composable solutions, enabling retailers to quickly and conveniently expand payment options across various markets.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:43 - Why Open Payment Framework (OPF) for SAP Commerce Cloud?
01:26 - Which scenarios does SAP’s OPF offer?
02:31 - How can customers adopt SAP’s OPF?
03:57 - Start of the Demo
04:08 - Demo: SAP Commerce Cloud storefront with check-out payment options
06:13 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Site Assignment
07:35 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Refund Configuration
09:54 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Authorization Configuration
11:56 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Payment Transactions
13:35 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Manual Refund
14:50 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Logs
16:21 - Demo: SAP Open Payment Framework - Compliance

 

5. Open Search Service for SAP Commerce Cloud in Action

Etienne Guilhaume from the Commerce Product Team at SAP provides an overview on the new Search Service. Watch this product inspiration video to learn how use the Search Service along with Intelligent Selling Services in SAP Commerce Cloud to drive conversion and accelerate growth.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:27 - Why the Search Service for SAP Commerce Cloud?
01:56 - Where can the Search Service be very beneficial?
02:32 - How can SAP customers adopt the Search Service?
03:28 - Start of the demo
03:50 - Demo: Product search in SAP Commerce Cloud storefront
04:48 - Demo: Related products on Product Detail Page
05:16 - Demo: Adaptive Search configuration in SAP Commerce Cloud backoffice
06:20 - Demo: Intelligent Search: Show personalized products based on search history
06:41 - Demo: Intelligent Search: trending searches, most popular searches, recommended products
08:03 - Demo: Show search results when decreasing AI personalization in ISS
09:04 - Demo: How to switch between Solr Search and the new Search Service
10:26 - Demo: Show search results when increasing AI personalization in ISS
10:51 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

Enjoy and please reach out if you have any questions.

 

Back to the Product Inspiration Series 2025  |  Wave I  |  Wave II

entry.title: Re: ODP MODIFY DELTA DATE CLIENT EXTRACTOR
entry.content: Thank you Roland,

entry.title: Bridging Real-World Safety Practices with Digital Compliance: The Role of SAP EHS
entry.content:
Introduction

Environment, Health, and Safety (EHS) is not just a department—it's a critical function woven in day-to-day operations of companies across industries such as manufacturing, oil & gas, chemicals, pharmaceuticals, and energy. Whether it's managing chemical hazards, ensuring worker safety, or adhering to environmental regulations, every organization has developed its own set of EHS practices.

But how do these manual or semi-digital processes translate into enterprise-wide, standardized, and auditable systems? That’s where SAP EHS (Environment, Health, and Safety Management) steps in—aligning industry practices with regulatory needs through structured digital workflows.

How Industries Handle EHS Today

Many organizations implement EHS practices in the form of:

  • Safety checklists and paper-based inspections
  • Spreadsheet tracking of chemical inventory or incidents
  • Email-based reporting and approvals
  • Periodic compliance audits using manual templates
  • Localized document storage of Safety Data Sheets (SDS)

While these methods may work in warehouse or for small teams, they often result in:

  • Delayed incident responses
  • Gaps in regulatory compliance
  • Inconsistent data reporting
  • Lack of traceability and audit readiness

What is SAP EHS?

SAP EHS is an integrated component of SAP S/4HANA that digitizes and standardizes all aspects of EHS management. It allows businesses to proactively manage risks, ensure compliance, and support employee health and safety with greater control and visibility.

The solution covers:

  • Product Safety & Compliance
  • Occupational Health Management
  • Incident Management & Risk Assessment
  • Dangerous Goods Handling
  • Substance Volume Tracking (SVT)
  • Environmental Management & Emissions Tracking

By centralizing EHS processes, SAP ensures that what used to be fragmented, and manual becomes automated, standardized, and globally auditable.

Comparing Industry Practice vs. SAP EHS Implementation

Aspect

Traditional Industry Practice

With SAP EHS

Incident Reporting

Manual, delayed escalation

Real-time capture and tracking

SDS Management

Stored locally or emailed

Centralized, version-controlled documentation

Risk Assessment

Excel or Word templates

Structured, workflow-driven risk evaluations

Regulatory Compliance

Regional and siloed efforts

Global compliance with integrated regulations

Health Surveillance

Paper-based records or local systems

Complete employee health history and tracking

Audit Readiness

Manual report compilation

Dashboards, KPIs, and audit trails in one place

 

Why SAP EHS Matters Today

With rising regulatory pressure, ESG reporting requirements, and a growing emphasis on worker wellbeing, businesses can no longer afford to treat EHS as a back-office function. SAP EHS not only ensures legal compliance but also builds a culture of proactive safety, risk awareness, and environmental stewardship.

Key benefits include:

  • Improved operational transparency
  • Better decision-making with real-time data
  • Global standardization of safety practices
  • Alignment with sustainability and ESG goals

Why Choose SAP EHS Over Third-Party EHS Tools?

Many companies evaluate third-party EHS platforms that promise modern user interfaces or industry-specific features. However, SAP EHS stands out for organizations already running on SAP ERP or S/4HANA due to several strategic, functional, and usability advantages:

1. Native Integration with SAP ERP/S/4HANA

  • No need for middleware or complex interfaces.
  • EHS processes are tightly linked to materials management, HR master data, logistics, production, and procurement.
  • Seamless data flow improves accuracy and efficiency across business functions.

2. Unified User Experience with SAP Fiori

  • SAP EHS leverages the modern SAP Fiori UI, which is responsive, role-based, and mobile-ready.
  • Safety professionals, plant users, and managers can access the system on tablets, phones, or desktops with a consistent interface.
  • Personalized dashboards and quick actions reduce user training time.

3. Enhanced Security and Compliance

  • SAP’s robust role-based authorization ensures data protection and regulatory compliance.
  • All activities are logged and auditable—crucial for internal audits, ISO certifications, or legal inquiries.

4. Real-Time Analytics and Reporting

  • Leverage SAP Embedded Analytics or SAP Analytics Cloud to get real-time insights into incidents, compliance KPIs, risk levels, and more.
  • Drill-down capabilities help management take faster, data-driven decisions.

5. Long-Term Scalability and Support

  • SAP EHS evolves with your business and regulatory landscape—especially with the shift to ESG and carbon accounting.
  • Supported by SAP’s roadmap and continuous innovation, unlike niche third-party tools which may face support or scalability limitations.

6. Lower TCO (Total Cost of Ownership)

  • Organizations with an existing SAP footprint benefit from license reusability, shared infrastructure, and a single support ecosystem.
  • No need for separate integrations or duplicate master data maintenance.

Real-World Example

Let’s say a manufacturing company uses a third-party tool to manage incidents, but their procurement and production data lies in SAP. This often leads to:

  • Delays in root-cause analysis (data mismatch),
  • Repetitive data entry (duplication),
  • Gaps in traceability (no direct link to materials or equipment).

In SAP EHS, these are handled in the same system—linking incidents to hazardous substances, material movements, work centers, and even employees.

Conclusion

Every company already practices some form of EHS. The real transformation happens when those practices are digitized, standardized, and scaled using enterprise-grade solutions like SAP EHS. It's not just about compliance—it's about building a safer, more sustainable, and future-ready organization.

If you're still relying on manual or semi-digital EHS processes, it may be time to rethink how technology like SAP can elevate your safety culture.

Regards,

Ramnarayana Valluri

entry.title: Re: Restriction of material sale in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
If we understood the query-you want to restrict the sales of a material for customers just for time being,

if yes-you can change the Item category group which is in material master>sales org2 view(normally for regular sales materials-you will have NORM-you can try keeping some newly created Z-Item category group & see to it that no VOV4 settings maintained-so system will stop during sales order creation.

entry.title: Re: ODP MODIFY DELTA DATE CLIENT EXTRACTOR
entry.content: I've read that table ODQSUBSCR is similar to ROOSGENDLM, but i haven't ODQSUBSCR table, so I thought that it would be another table

entry.title: Re: FU in Blocked status for Inter co sales order in S/4...
entry.content:
Hi

Please check the following items thoroughly and in every detail:

Setup guide for Advanced Intercompany Sales

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/5D2_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

 

Setup guide 6W2 Manual Transportation Planning

 

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/SAAP/Sol_Pack/S4C/Library/Setup/6W2_Set-Up_EN_XX.pdf

 

Update Business Partner for Advanced Intercompany Scenarios

 

Update Incoterms in Purchasing Info Record

 

Create Freight Agreement (3TL)

https://help.sap.com/doc/72088e7bbc375ec290168d5b700e74d4/2408/en-US/3TL_S4CLD2408_Master_Data_EN_XX.pdf

 

Create Freight Agreement for Freight Forwarder1 (Invoice Verification) – Ocean (Inter-company Scenarios)

 

I hope this helps.

 

Best Regards

Frank

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Technician Standard Persona in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content: @LadaB - The link is now updated.

entry.title: Mass update check rule for the business partners.
entry.content:
We recently enabled credit management BP Role for 5000 customers (In Production System), in "Credit profile" check rule we kept wrongly as "01" instead of "02" and we don't have this filed to mass update.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Mass update check rule for the business partners.
entry.content:
Use the job template Update Rules for Scoring and Credit Check for updating of scoring and credit limit calculation, and the checking rule.

The information is also provided in the SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3613088

entry.title: Product Inspiration Series - Experience a New Era of SAP CX (wave #2)
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I'm excited to share our latest deep dive videos as part of the SAP Product Inspiration Series 2025 focusing on innovations across SAP CX and Consumer Industries. 

Wave #2 (May 2025):

1. Akeneo Product Information Management for SAP Commerce Cloud in Action

Emma Le Goff, Product Manager at Akeneo, provides an overview on Akeneo's Product Cloud and how it integrates with SAP CX. Watch this product inspiration video to learn how AI-powered integration is reshaping customer experience, as well as the real-world customer success stories showcasing the benefits of Akeneo Product Cloud in partnership with SAP.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:27 - Why Akeneo Product Cloud and SAP?
01:58 - What business value does your solution offer?
03:51 - Which role does AI play in Akeneo Product Cloud?
05:40 - Start of the demo
06:24 - Demo: Manage products in Akeneo PX Insights
07:07 - Demo: Generate new product description using Gen AI in Akeneo
07:18 - Demo: Change product image using Akeneo SmartEdit
07:29 - Demo: See results in SAP Commerce Cloud
07:42 - Demo: Manage integrations via SAP Integration Suite
08:14 - Demo: Check product details in SAP Commerce Cloud Admin Cockpit
08:43 - Demo: View product performance in Akeneo PX Insights
09:39 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

2. Gen AI powered Business Information Extraction for SAP Enterprise Service Management

 

See how Generative AI is transforming SAP Enterprise Service Management! Join Shanna Bauer (Product Manager, SAP Business AI) and Viswa Manapetty (Lead Product Manager, SAP Enterprise Service Management) as they explore the business value of Business Information Extraction within SAP ESM. Discover how AI-driven automation simplifies processing payment advices, sales order changes, and even handwritten cheques. Watch step-by-step demos and learn how customers can adopt these innovations to boost productivity and streamline workflows.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:26 - Why Generative AI in SAP Enterprise Service Management?
02:05 - What business value does Business Information Extraction in SAP Enterprise Service Management provide?
03:54 - How can customers adopt Business Information Extraction in SAP Enterprise Service Management?
05:26 - Start of the Demo
05:40 - Demo: SAP Enterprise Service Management (ESM)
06:10 - Demo: Creating new cases for incoming Payment Advices, Sales Order changes and Handwritten Cheques
07:34 - Demo: Process Payment Advices using Business Information Extraction
10:22 - Demo: Process Sales Order changes using Business Information Extraction
11:35 - Demo: Process Handwritten Cheques using Business Information Extraction
14:19 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

3. Intelligent Selling with Joule in SAP Sales Cloud and S/4HANA Cloud in Action

Discover how Joule, SAP’s AI copilot, boosts productivity in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2! Join Shanna Bauer (Product Manager, SAP Business AI) and Rishi Hemdev (Product Manager, SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2) as they showcase Intelligent Selling with SAP Joule. Learn how sales reps can leverage Joule to manage accounts, access key metrics, identify business strategies, generate talking points, and seamlessly convert leads into opportunities.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:48 - Why Joule AI copilot in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2?
02:08 - For which scenarios can Joule help simplify the work of sales reps?
03:28 - How can customers activate Joule in SAP Sales Cloud Version 2?
04:45 - Start of the Demo
06:12 - Demo: Using Joule to open My Accounts
06:36 - Demo: Using Joule to get an Account Overview
07:02 - Demo: Using Joule to show Key Metrics of an Account (incl. S/4HANA)
08:10 - Demo: Asking Joule about Current Challenges of an Account
08:37 - Demo: Asking Joule about the next Meeting with this Account
09:32 - Demo: Asking Joule about the Business Strategies of an Account
09:50 - Demo: Using Joule to show Leads for an Account
10:24 - Demo: Using Joule to get an Overview of a Lead
10:59 - Demo: Using Joule to get some Talking Points for a Lead
11:58 - Demo: Asking Joule about how to convert a Lead into an Opportunity (SAP Help Portal)
13:04 - Demo: Using Joule to open a Lead
14:56 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

4. Contentful Composable Content Platform for SAP CX

Mike Neynolds from Contentful provides an overview on Contentful Composable CMS and how it integrates with SAP CX. Watch this product inspiration video to learn how AI-powered content generation and its integration with Customer Portals running on SAP Commerce Cloud.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:41 - Why Contentful and SAP CX?
01:52 - What is the value proposition for this joint solution?
03:10 - How is Gen AI used at Contentful to drive business value?
04:52 - Start of the Demo
05:04 - Demo: Contentful B2B Customer Portal
06:07 - Demo: Contentful B2B Customer Portal - Articles
07:15 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Overview
07:44 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Add a new article
08:25 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - AI & Automation
08:55 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - AI Actions
10:21 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Generate blog post from existing content
16:25 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Find additional AI apps from Marketplace
17:15 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Continue with the blog post creation
20:39 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Generate alternative text for blog post
22:05 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Translate the description of the blog post
23:05 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Generate teaser for blog post
24:52 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Translate all other texts of the blog post
26:15 - Demo: Contentful Composable CMS - Define experiences for articles page
27:42 - Demo: Contentful B2B Customer Portal - Result of new blog post
28:34 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

5. SAP CX AI Toolkit Deep Dive: AI Insights Agents for SAP C4C, Custom AI Agents & Shopping Assistant in Action (coming soon)

6.Connecting Customer-Centric Service to Inhouse-Repair across SAP Business Suite (coming soon)

7. Seamless Customer-Centric Service Order Management across SAP Business Suite (coming soon)

Enjoy and please reach out if you have any questions.

 

Back to the Product Inspiration Series 2025  |  Wave I   |  Wave II

entry.title: Re: Securing Your Data with Data Access Controls in Datasphere
entry.content: I'm looking into DataAccessControl and can only find that this can be maintained manually. Users and Role/Scooped role assignment can be automatically created/provisioned via attributes in SAML ticket. But I can't find anything that indicates DataAccessControl also to be updated automatically from SAML ticket. If I have user attributes, role assignment and organizationsal level information from IdP (included in SAML ticket), isn't it possible to update also DataAccessControl in DataSphere? Strange if this is a separate manual process when the other things can be automized.

entry.title: Are you ready to use Concur Expense Mobile on Android?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Getting Started with Concur Expense Mobile Android for Users learning journey.
With the completion of this learning journey, you will be prepared for the certification C_S4CS. 

Learning Objectives
This learning journey with demos and practice simulations will introduce business users to the basics of Concur Expense (Mobile Android) such as profile features, creating a new expense report, the expense report approval process and roles, as well as additional expense report features needed to be successful in submitting their expense reports.

Learning objectives

  • Explain an overview of SAP Concur and how to do basic tasks (signing in, profile, home page).
  • Set Up Your Concur Expense Profile.
  • Create a New Expense Report and basic expense line items.
  • Explain What Happens Once You Submit your Expense Report.
  • Set up Additional Expense Report Features.

Please post you question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: 多成本中心共用固定资产，折旧如何分配？
entry.content: 请问这个实际操作如何处理，用的那些APP额

In eclipse I right click on the package and select New > Other Repository Object.

I try to create an 'IAM app' but it doesn't appear as if it doesn't exist:

I tried reinstalling the ABAP tools but the error persists

entry.title: Re: Securing Your Data with Data Access Controls in Datasphere
entry.content:
@M_Lov Check this blog!

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/integrate-sap-s-4hana-authorizations-into-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13644117

entry.title: Re: In RAP, Issue with BAPI Warning Message Handling in Unmanaged Save
entry.content: @verreydthans No.

entry.title: Re: how to remove decimal places from field type number i...
Every time I try to multiply two different accounts in a data actions, the results is zero
entry.content:
Hi! I am trying to create various Data Action Steps where the goal ist to calculate Account-values in the future based on Drivers which are being typed in by the user. Since I do have a hierarchy, and the calculations are often done on a parent node, I need to somehow say how to break down the values to its leafs. My Idea was: 

Data() = RESULTLOOKUP(Leaf) / RESULTLOOKUP(Parent) * (RESULTLOOKUP(Driver1) * 11100 )+ RESULTLOOKUP(Driver2) * RESULTLOOKUP(Driver3))

where RESULTLOOKUP(Leaf) / RESULTLOOKUP(Parent) basically tells how much weight of the total the current leaf has. 

Unfortunately everytime I multiply the weight with one of the Drivers, the values are displayed as "0". 

Can someone help me please?  

SAP Analytics Cloud #Planning #DataAction#

entry.title: Linking Documentation to Start and End Page
entry.content:
I am using the SAP start and end page template and would like to link the "Open PDF Document" to the documentation generated in the existing project.

 

Currently it links to the documentation that was part of the template - see image below. 

Also, how can I get the duration to pick up the simulation duration. Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Securing Your Data with Data Access Controls in Datasphere
entry.content: Thanks, we have looked into that option but we have users with no access to S4 system and therefor can't get all information from there. There are options to fetch the information from IdP aswell but I think there is a hugh correlation between creating user, assigning role and give row-level access. Two out of three can be provided from SAML.

entry.title: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a requirement where the underlying tables are dynamic (condition tables). I need to build a RAP application on top of this setup. However, I'm facing a challenge: I can't enable draft functionality because the CDS view is a query implemented by a class, and draft is not supported in this scenario.

Draft functionality is crucial for my use case. Does anyone have experience with a similar setup or suggestions on how to handle this? Any ideas on enabling draft or dynamically handling such data in a RAP application would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Basic Trial
entry.content:
Ready to Transform Your Integration Strategy?

Kick off your 30-day SAP Integration Suite Basic Trial and follow our step-by-step guide to seamlessly connect your hybrid landscape—including SAP S/4HANA Cloud and 3rd-party cloud-based databases.

  • Build a Digital Integration Hub on SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP)
  • Leverage advanced integration services to unify diverse systems
  • Apply the Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISAM) to model, manage, and adapt APIs with ease

With clear, guided instructions, you’ll experience how to streamline application, data, and process integration across your ecosystem.

  1. Sign up for a free Basic Trial and follow the easy registration steps.
  2. Access the guided workbook to walk through real-world use cases.
  3. Publish applications and test APIs in SAP Developer Hub .

The architecture

The architecture is designed to retrieve and consolidate maintenance orders associated with products that have been purchased. The overall objective is to enable a unified view of maintenance obligations linked to each product, regardless of the system in which they were generated or processed.

  • Source System - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Product purchase orders are initially processed within SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
  • PostgreSQL Application Database - Maintenance Data

The step-by-step guide covers the following important topics:

Integration Assessment Overview

Implement the Integration Solution Advisory Methodology to support the definition of the integration landscape. It helps to define integration patterns and to ensure consistent usage of the integration technology. Integration Assessment provides users with a guided approach to assess their integration strategy and recommends the appropriate technologies for their business.

Create the integration flow

Implement an integration flow that maps sales orders from SAP S4/HANA Cloud with maintenance orders from a cloud based maintenance order database

Create and deploy API

Publish, promote, and oversee APIs in a secure and scalable environment with SAP API Management. During the unit, you will secure and publish an API. This API can then be used by any developer - internal or external - in a secure way, to build integrations or applications.
 

Use SAP Developers Hub:

Implement Application Key policies:

 

Test you application deployment

 

Important:

The basic trial only offers a selected subset of the overall functionality of SAP Integration Suite. Key user capabilities and administration rights for customization, master data management, or integration are not offered in this trial.

entry.title: Ad hoc Query/Report Creation in SAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for a tool (third party like toad, etc. or native) that can help in creating ad hoc queries/reports using SAP tables. Something similar, but way better than SQVI tcode (since this is not that user friendly and has a few limitations). The requirement is for non-developers to be able to create their own queries/reports directly in production environment based on their SAP access (and not have their users created on HANA DB). What would be the best tool in this case? I tried to connect Toad but that asked for hana db details (containers, OS/DB credentials, etc.).

entry.title: Duplicate Check for S/4HANA Business Partner Master data
entry.content:
How to set up Duplicate Check for Business Partner Master data ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Check for S/4HANA Business Partner Master data
entry.content:
For Duplicate check for Business Partner Master data, Create a new configuration in the configuration activity - 100274 and add a configuration.

  • Set a new configuration with rules that contain new attributes for a duplicate check.

Refer below KBA for more details : How to set up Duplicate Check for Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Report type for notification
entry.content:
Hope it got changed in hana

Report types are assigned against plant and workcenter

Report type

Confirmation Profile

Notification Type

entry.title: Re: Carry-forward time valuation results into next day
entry.content:
Hi @rafledeganck @

As per my knowhow, I am not sure if we can do such a thing where we can lookup the time type group via a container of previous logical day and mark that as time pay type for payroll for next day

However the below workaround might work. Please evaluate it further

1. Store the time after midnight in the a time container or a daily collector.  Dont mark this as time pay type in the corresponding TTG. This would be stored as part of the current logical day (D)

2. Use Integration Center or CPI to map this time container to a one time payment (You can use a Pay component of type Number instead of amount where number of hours is the paycomponent unit). And in IC you can set it to D+1 as the One time payment date. This would then move the data to IT0015 instead of IT2010 and perhaps you would need some payroll handling to read such cross midnight wage types from IT 15 rather than IT 2010

A similar thing was done as part of this blog

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blog-posts-by-sap/brazil-vacation-bonus-in-employee-central-time/ba-p/13452003

If you don't want to do the above , Perhaps this needs to be handled in the payroll where the date for such a wage type after replication to 2010 is updated using some post processing Badi or directly modify via PCR/Function in payroll. BTW I am not a payroll expert

Hope this helps

Best Regards

Neelesh

entry.title: Re: When I create a material in S4Hana the following erro...
entry.content: Read first KBA 3237701 - Internal error in FORM/FUNCTION CKMS_PERIOD_POST_DELTA

entry.title: Re: Connect external candidate to employee record in EC
entry.content:
Hi @tanyaV , hope you're doing good.

I'm sharing some information about this topic, hoping that it can help you with your doubt.

Unfortunately, there is no direct way to merge an external candidate profile with a manually created employee record in SAP SuccessFactors. However, here are some potential approaches to handle this situation:

  1. External to Internal Candidate Profile Conversion:
    • A scheduled batch program called "External to Internal Candidate Profile Conversion" can be set up to consolidate candidate profiles.
    • This program compares the User ID of the new hire with the Employee ID of external candidate records.
    • When a match is found, the two profiles are consolidated, and the external profile is removed.
  2. Manual Profile Update:
    • Update the external candidate profile with the Employee ID of the manually created employee record.
    • This can help establish a link between the two records, even if not fully merged.
  3. Custom Integration:
    • Develop a custom integration to link the external candidate data with the manually created employee record.
    • This would involve mapping relevant fields between the two entities.
  4. Data Migration:
    • Perform a one-time data migration to transfer relevant information from the external candidate profile to the employee record in Employee Central.
  5. Candidate to Employee Integration Template:
    • If not already done, configure the Candidate to Employee integration template to map fields between Recruiting and Employee Central for future hires .
  6. Review Automatic Hire Process:
    • Consider setting up the Automatic Hire process for future cases to avoid manual employee creation and ensure seamless integration between Recruiting and Employee Central .

Remember that these approaches may have limitations and may not provide a perfect merge. It's important to carefully consider data integrity and compliance when attempting to link or consolidate records.

For future hires, ensure that the proper integration between Recruiting, Onboarding (if used), and Employee Central is set up to avoid similar situations .

References:

Setting Up and Maintaining SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

Recruiting with Integration to Position Management and Onboarding: Test Script

Regards.

Thiago Eva

entry.title: Re: Picture image - reference one of three image by name...
entry.content:
I am not sure if I understood the scenario correctly, but the very common solution is to place required images on the top of each other and conditionally suppress them. For example if you want to display a flag based on the country, then place all possible flags on the top of each other and conditionally suppress all of them.

If you add more details to your scenario, I will try to provide more details to proposed solution.

entry.title: SolMan 7.2 SPS 20 ACP file 63 not found
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have created the XML stack for SPS20 in Maintenance Planner for Solution Manager and is requesting to dow load the file 

ST-PI740.SAR
Attribute Change Package 63 for ST-PI 740

Does anybody know where can I get this file?, I have searched everywhere but could not find it.
For any help I will be very much appreciated

BR

Max

entry.title: How to create a debit memo directly from a contract without having to create a debit memo request?
entry.content:
How to create a debit memo directly from a contract without having to create a debit memo request?

Because of contract not having a net value, debit memo is also getting posted with zero value.

Thanks in advance,

Naveen

entry.title: Re: Put watermark on existing pdf
entry.content: Samindra, did you manage to find a solution? I have similar requirement.

entry.title: Re: how to remove decimal places from field type number i...
entry.content: Hello @thiago Eva , thanks for your answer the "number format" does not exist in manage templates > job requisition, it only exists in manage templates > job application

entry.title: Re: Get technical information from Service Definition using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello Ekalyvas,

as fas as I know, there is no such a standard FM or class, because calling metadata is the standard way for such services ( and not only in SAP world). But there are tools in abap for converting the results of the metadata call to convert them to abap tables/strucutres. ( e.g. XML transformation etc..)

entry.content: Oauth section under security Tab in SAP BTP is missing. Have all authorizations but don't see Oauth section.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Object Store activation in partner tenant
entry.content:
Hello,

before opening the ticket I found that our tenant has feature flag DWCO_LARGE_SYSTEMS = true

So I do not understand if the system is already enabled or not ( I do not have the tenant configuration tab so I can not see if there is an object store attached).

From space management I can not add a spaced based on "file" so I think is not enabled.

Do you confirm that the procedure is only opening a ticket with "This ticket is a service request for enablement of feature toggle "DWCO_LARGE_SYSTEMS" in Datasphere Tenant ..." ?

Thank you in advance

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: H1_2025 P4 | Manage Pending Hire RBP permission issue
entry.content: solved last friday by SAP support thanks to script execution at instance level

entry.title: How to fix time out issues where tracking won't allow user to complete?
entry.content:
SAP Success Factors LMS. (latest version)
SCORM 1.2 uploaded/generated from Articulate 365. (latest version)

Training packages works for multiple users/across multiple accounts. However, some users experience inability to complete training(s) after timing out their session. (Can find no issues in the trainings themselves, tested across multiple browsers and multiple systems with no issues. This seems to be a random issue and does not seem to be narrowed in on one user or even one training.  The only common point seems to be that they either multi-task away from the LMS session browser window or let their training sit open overnight so it times out...consequently they are able to finish the training in the buffered window/session - but it doesn't track properly and won't officially complete for them in the LMS backend. 

Wondering if there is a way to mitigate/avoid this? Perhaps an auto log-out feature/setting? (does one even exist?)

entry.title: Re: How to debug an error message during S/4 HANA Billing document creation(VF01)
entry.content: Very helpful post! Thank you for the sharing!

entry.title: Re: DC33 | Home Page Error | Looks like something went wrong
entry.content: Also having this issue

entry.title: Re: DC33 | Home Page Error | Looks like something went wrong
entry.content:
Yes, all instances from DC33 are affected: performancemanager5 + hcm12preview.

Hope to be solved soon.

entry.title: ABAP Proxy Transfoms ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In S/4HANA On Premise/Private Cloud to transform an abap proxy into xml, and vice versa, we can use the CL_PROXY_XML_TRANSFORM class.

Unfortunately this class is not released for use in the cloud.

Is there a class in S/4HANA Public Cloud, which has the same functionality?

If not, can you suggest an alternative way for the transformation?

Thanks in advance.

Best Regards.

Marco Spera

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Escaped! It was fun. Learned some bits here and there in this journey.

Thanks for such challenges.

entry.title: Re: Ad hoc Query/Report Creation in SAP
entry.content:
EPI-Use has Query manager that works well with SAP HCM tables.

I like SAP SQ01 ad hoc query; you still need to know the tables and joins.

If the CDS views are already built, SAP Analysis Office is good to work with.

Is there any plan to support the SAP Activate for SAP Sustainability Solutions Portfolio template in Cloud ALM please?

Many thanks,

Paul

entry.title: Multiple Billing Document Attachments in Single Email Transmission
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

Is it possible to group multiple Billing Documents (PDF Attachments) for the same customer in a single email output transmission?

entry.title: FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION
entry.content:
On using loop condition as suggested by Google Gemini to prepare the code for BAdI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION for performing profit center substitution for intercompany supplier invoice journal entries as requested by our client, we are unable to get it to work as it reads such journal entries line by line. Due to the restrictions of this BAdI and the cloud environment, it is not working as expected. SAP has confirmed this restriction of the BAdI that when it operates in context of one item, the other items of posting can't be accessed.

We are getting a ODATA runtime error: 'TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED' while using the loop condition. We are also getting similar runtime errors while performing other functions like PGI for outbound delivery, MIGO post goods receipt etc.

 

Also conditions like class and method can't be used for coding due to non availability of these keywords in the cloud environment
